name: Evil Eyes Unleashed
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>災</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>誕</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>呪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>眼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Send 1 "Evil Eye" monster and 1 "Evil Eye" Spell/Trap from your Deck to the GY; add 1 "Evil Eye" Equip Spell from your Deck to your hand, but for the rest of this turn, each time you activate a non-"Evil Eye" card or effect, you lose 500 LP. If you Link Summon an "Evil Eye" Link Monster: You can banish this card from your GY; equip 1 "Evil Eye" Equip Spell from your GY to 1 "Evil Eye" Link Monster you control. You can only use each effect of "Evil Eyes Unleashed" once per turn.
eff: Send 1 "Evil Eye" monster and 1 "Evil Eye" Spell/Trap from your Deck to the GY; add 1 "Evil Eye" Equip Spell from your Deck to your hand, but for the rest of this turn, each time you activate a non-"Evil Eye" card or effect, you lose 500 LP. If you Link Summon an "Evil Eye" Link Monster: You can banish this card from your GY; equip 1 "Evil Eye" Equip Spell from your GY to 1 "Evil Eye" Link Monster you control. You can only use each effect of "Evil Eyes Unleashed" once per turn.

action: Sends from Deck to Graveyard for cost
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
